name: Moga Source
subtitle: Official sideloading source for Moga
description: This is the official sideloading source for Moga, a reader based on MangaDex. Use this if you don't want to deal with TestFlight.

apps.name: Moga
apps.subtitle: A pretty nice manga reader if I do say so myself
apps.localizedDescription:
Moga is a manga reader app built to interface with MangaDex's vast library, with usability and gesture-based UX design at its core.

- Read anything available in MangaDex's library directly
- Log in to your account
- Follow/unfollow mangas
- See recently updated mangas you've followed
- Easy pick-back-up shortcuts (client side)
- Minimize/juggle two mangas at the same time (client side)
- Set language/content preferences (client side)
- And so on.

This app requires that you generate a private client ID if you wish to log in. See https://moga.moe for more info.

By default the app is in safe mode, but there is an nsfw-enabling mode if you go into About and tap the cats three times.

versions.localizedDescription:
# release/1.0.1-1

Changes since release/build-62

- 1.0.1 Build 1 (44557b5, 2026-03-08)
- Add AltStore moga-source.json update to iOS release workflow (4918643, 2026-03-08)
- Style home section caret with circular pill container (a0fe1a3, 2026-03-06)
- Fix crash when parsing MangaDex JSON responses (3a38b03, 2026-03-06)
- Guard JSON parsing against nil response data in services manager (47455ac, 2026-03-06)
- Refactor Home collection views to diffable data sources (4f8d60c, 2026-03-06)
- Delay Pick Back Up load until home data is available (ddfa4a4, 2026-03-04)
Many UI updates and crash fixes.
